title: Week of March 23, 2026
summary: This week brought significant improvements to OpsPal's reliability and Windows support. We expanded execution tracking to HubSpot and Marketo for better audit trails, enhanced production safety controls for Salesforce operations, and added native Windows installation support. The new automated release notes system will keep you better informed of platform updates going forward.

entries.headline: Expanded execution tracking to HubSpot and Marketo
details: OpsPal now provides complete audit trails when working with HubSpot and Marketo, matching the execution tracking already available for Salesforce

entries.headline: Enhanced production safety for Salesforce data retrieval
details: OpsPal now safely allows read-only operations like retrieving metadata from production Salesforce orgs without triggering safety warnings

entries.headline: Added automated release notes system
details: OpsPal now automatically generates and publishes release notes, making it easier to stay informed about platform updates and new features

entries.headline: Streamlined simple Salesforce data lookups
details: Quick record lookups and small queries now run faster without unnecessary routing overhead

entries.headline: Added native Windows installation support
details: Windows users can now install OpsPal directly without additional setup tools
The installer automatically handles Claude Code, Node.js, and other dependencies

entries.headline: Better error detection and reporting for connected systems
details: OpsPal now detects connection issues with Salesforce and other platforms faster and provides clearer error messages

entries.headline: Improved Windows PowerShell installation experience
details: Fixed installation issues when running the setup script directly from the web

entries.headline: Enhanced Salesforce revenue context tracking
details: Assessment results now capture revenue-related information for better analysis and reporting

entries.headline: Added customization framework for templates and branding
details: You can now customize OpsPal templates and branding elements that persist through platform updates

entries.headline: Enhanced revenue field detection in Salesforce assessments
details: OpsPal now automatically identifies your org's revenue fields and sales processes
Assessments adapt to your specific revenue tracking setup instead of assuming standard fields

entries.headline: Improved setup experience and project detection
details: The initial setup process now works more reliably and detects existing projects better

entries.headline: Added Salesforce deployment safety checks
details: New tools prevent problematic deployments by checking picklist configurations, field history limits, and dependency conflicts before deployment

entries.headline: Added secret scanning to prevent credential leaks
details: OpsPal now automatically scans for accidentally committed credentials and API keys

entries.headline: Removed hardcoded credentials from platform files
details: Enhanced security by removing any embedded credentials from the platform code

entries.headline: Fixed Salesforce deployment validation errors
details: Resolved three issues in flow analysis that were causing unnecessary deployment failures
